meta.title: Settings
meta.description: Manage your admin security settings, sessions, and password.

adminAccount.title: Change password
adminAccount.subtitle: Update your admin password and sign back in with the new credentials.
adminAccount.errorFallback: Password change failed. Check your inputs and try again.
adminAccount.success: Password updated. Sign in again with your new password.

settings.title: Settings
settings.copy: Manage your profile, account controls, security, and active sessions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.copy: Review your admin identity and account metadata.

avatar.title: Profile picture
avatar.copy: Upload a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image up to {{sizeMB}}MB.

crop.title: Crop your new profile picture
crop.copy: Drag the photo and use corner handles to adjust the crop.

errors.update: Profile picture could not be updated right now.
errors.invalidFormat: Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
errors.invalidImage: Selected file is not a valid image.

errors.nameUpdate: Name could not be updated right now.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.copy: Choose how the admin panel looks for your account on this browser.

username.title: Change username
username.copy: Update your username for your admin account.
username.label: New username

delete.title: Delete account
delete.copy: Permanently disable this admin account. This action cannot be undone.

success.deleted: Account deleted. You are being signed out.

errors.usernameUpdate: Username could not be updated right now.
errors.deleteAccount: Account could not be deleted right now.

form.copy: Changing your password revokes existing refresh sessions and sends you back to login.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.copy: Review signed-in devices and revoke sessions you no longer trust.

errors.load: Active sessions could not be loaded right now.

errorsCatalog.title: Error messages
errorsCatalog.copy: List, filter, create, update, and delete admin API error messages.
errorsCatalog.empty: No error messages found for the current filter.

create.copy: Add a new localized message by code.
create.codeValidation: Use only uppercase letters, numbers, and underscore (2-120 chars).

update.copy: Edit or delete the currently selected message.
update.empty: Select an error message to edit.

errors.load: Error messages could not be loaded.
errors.create: Error message could not be created.
errors.update: Error message could not be updated.
errors.delete: Error message could not be deleted.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.copy: Every create, update, and delete action is recorded.

errors.load: Audit log could not be loaded.

validation.newPasswordDifferent: Choose a password different from the current one.
validation.nameLength: Name must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.
validation.usernameLength: Username must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.
validation.usernamePattern: Use letters, numbers, dot, underscore, or dash only.
validation.usernameDifferent: Choose a username different from the current one.
